description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on push to main, tags, and pull requests, excluding paths under joss and docs. The workflow has multiple jobs: tests, numpy_edge, coverage, lint, build, and upload_pypi. The tests job runs on multiple Python versions and OSes, installing dependencies and running tests with tox and coverage. The numpy_edge job tests NumPy edge cases. The coverage job combines and uploads coverage data. The lint job lints the code with tox. The build job builds a package and uploads it as an artifact. The upload_pypi job uploads the package to PyPI on tag pushes.
